message:
feat(core): add DigestAuth extractor and fault injection module

Add HTTP Digest authentication extractor stub with parameter parsing,
and deterministic fault injection for resilience testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -141,7 +141,7 @@
 {"id":"fastapi_rust-1iw","title":"HTTP parser test suite","description":"Comprehensive test suite for HTTP parser:
- Request line parsing: all methods, various paths, query strings
- Header parsing: standard headers, edge cases, multiline
- Body handling: Content-Length, chunked, empty
- Error cases: malformed requests, truncated input
- Security: smuggling, injection, oversized

TEST CATEGORIES:
1. Valid requests (happy path)
2. Edge cases (empty body, many headers, long values)
3. Invalid requests (proper error responses)
4. Security vectors (known attack patterns)
5. Performance (parsing throughput)

 {"id":"fastapi_rust-1jz","title":"Application lifecycle test suite","description":"Test suite for app lifecycle:

TEST CATEGORIES:

1. STARTUP
- on_startup hooks run before accepting
- Hook order preserved
- Hook failure prevents startup
- Async hooks work
- State initialization

2. SHUTDOWN
- on_shutdown hooks run after drain
- Graceful connection handling
- Cleanup completes
- Force shutdown after timeout

3. SIGNALS
- SIGTERM triggers shutdown
- SIGINT triggers shutdown
- In-flight requests complete
- New requests rejected during drain

4. CONFIGURATION
- Config loading
- Env var binding
- Validation at load
- Defaults applied

5. STATE
- State accessible in handlers
- Multiple state types
- Type-safe retrieval

6. INTEGRATION
- Full lifecycle: startup -> serve -> shutdown
- Error during lifecycle
- Multiple startup/shutdown cycles

COVERAGE TARGET: 90%+ for lifecycle code","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T15:18:14.403638196Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-28T17:46:12.522744049Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T17:46:12.522666024Z","close_reason":"Lifecycle tests exist in crates/fastapi-output/tests/integration_app_lifecycle.rs (startup, shutdown, signals) and crates/fastapi-core/src/app.rs (on_startup/on_shutdown hook tests). Complete coverage of startup hooks, shutdown hooks, async hooks, and state initialization.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["app","lifecycle","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-1jz","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-rbm","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:31Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"fastapi_rust-1kw","title":"HTTP 100-continue handling for large uploads","description":"Handle Expect: 100-continue header for large POST/PUT requests. Server should validate auth/content-type before telling client to send body, saving bandwidth on rejected requests.

**Implementation:**
- Check Expect header during request line parsing
- If 100-continue present, pause before body read
- Call pre-body validation hooks (auth, content-type check)
- Send '100 Continue' response if validation passes
- Send 417 Expectation Failed if validation fails
- Then proceed to read body

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Expect: 100-continue handled correctly
- Pre-body validation hooks called before 100 response
- 417 sent when validation fails
- Normal requests without Expect work unchanged
- Integration with auth middleware

**Tests:**
- POST with Expect gets 100 then proceeds
- POST with Expect and bad auth gets 401, no body read
- POST without Expect works normally
- Large upload with 100-continue completes successfully","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T16:12:34.843987822Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-29T04:40:44.416452895Z","closed_at":"2026-01-29T04:40:44.416390359Z","close_reason":"Fully implemented: ExpectHandler with check_expect(), pre-body validation (auth, content-type, content-length), configurable validators via PreBodyValidators, CONTINUE_RESPONSE constant, 612 lines of code with 18 passing tests.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["http","phase-1","uploads"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-1kw","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-d6d","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:31Z","created_by":"import"}]}
-{"id":"fastapi_rust-1lu","title":"HTTPDigest auth extractor (stub)","description":"HTTP Digest authentication stub (FastAPI only provides stub). Extract Authorization: Digest header, return HTTPAuthorizationCredentials with scheme=Digest and credentials. Does NOT implement full Digest challenge-response. OpenAPI security scheme type: http with scheme=digest. auto_error behavior same as other auth extractors. Test: verify header extraction, 401 response with WWW-Authenticate: Digest.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T15:43:38.166876187Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T15:43:38.166876187Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["auth","digest","phase-6","security"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-1lu","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-rh0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:31Z","created_by":"import"}]}

Extract Authorization: Digest header, return HTTPAuthorizationCredentials with scheme=Digest and credentials. Does NOT implement full Digest challenge-response. OpenAPI security scheme type: http with scheme=digest. auto_error behavior same as other auth extractors. Test: verify header extraction, 401 response with WWW-Authenticate: Digest.","status":"closed","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T15:43:38.166876187Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-29T05:41:11.758334404Z","closed_at":"2026-01-29T05:41:11.758270986Z","close_reason":"Added DigestAuth extractor stub with param extraction, FromRequest impl, and 6 tests","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["auth","digest","phase-6","security"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-1lu","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-rh0","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:31Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"fastapi_rust-1o5","title":"OpenAPI generation test suite","description":"Comprehensive test suite for OpenAPI generation:

TEST CATEGORIES:

1. PATH GENERATION
- Static paths
- Path parameters
- Query parameters
- Header parameters
- Multiple parameters

2. SCHEMA GENERATION
- Primitive types
- Structs with all field types
- Nested structs
- Enums
- Optional/nullable
- Arrays and maps

3. SCHEMA DEDUPLICATION
- Same type used twice = one schema
- Nested type refs
- Circular reference handling

4. REQUEST BODY
- JSON body schema
- Form body schema
- File upload schema
- Multiple content types

5. RESPONSES
- Default response
- Multiple status codes
- Response headers
- Error responses

6. SECURITY
- Bearer auth scheme
- Basic auth scheme
- API key schemes
- OAuth2 flows
- Scopes documentation

7. VALIDATION
- Generated doc is valid OpenAPI 3.1
- Validates against official schema
- Swagger UI can render it

COVERAGE TARGET: 95%+ for OpenAPI code","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T15:16:10.673742988Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-28T17:20:50.811649896Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T17:20:50.811586648Z","close_reason":"Added comprehensive OpenAPI generation test suite: 25 new integration tests covering path generation (7 tests), schema deduplication (4 tests), request body handling (4 tests), responses (1 test), metadata (4 tests), serialization (4 tests), plus full integration test. Total: 147 tests passing in fastapi-openapi crate.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["openapi","phase-5","tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-1o5","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-ams","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:31Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"fastapi_rust-1pf","title":"ETag and conditional request handling","description":"Implement ETag support for conditional requests. Features: automatic ETag generation from response body hash, If-None-Match header checking, 304 Not Modified responses, If-Match for PUT/PATCH (412 Precondition Failed), weak vs strong ETags. Configuration: per-route ETag strategy (auto, manual, disabled). Usage: #[etag] attribute or response.with_etag(value). Test: verify 304 returned when ETag matches, 412 on mismatch for writes, header format correct.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T16:09:53.494511432Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-29T04:39:09.794908138Z","closed_at":"2026-01-29T04:39:09.794843547Z","close_reason":"Implemented ETag and conditional request handling: added StatusCode::PRECONDITION_FAILED (412) with canonical reason, Response::not_modified() and Response::precondition_failed() builders, Response::with_etag() and with_weak_etag() helpers, check_if_none_match() for GET/HEAD 304 responses, check_if_match() for PUT/PATCH/DELETE 412 responses with strong comparison, apply_conditional() utility for full request evaluation, and 22 comprehensive tests covering exact match, wildcard, multiple ETags, weak comparison, and full request flow.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["caching","http","performance","phase-2"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-1pf","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-0qv","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:31Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"fastapi_rust-1rn","title":"Route conflict detection at startup","description":"Detect conflicting routes at application startup:
- Identify overlapping path patterns
- Report which routes conflict
- Fail fast with clear error message
- Handle edge cases: /users/{id} vs /users/me

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- Conflicting routes cause startup failure
- Error message names both conflicting routes
- Static routes take priority over dynamic
- Clear conflict resolution rules documented

TEST REQUIREMENTS:
- Unit: Various conflict scenarios
- Unit: Non-conflicting similar routes
- Integration: App startup failure","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T14:40:28.982038663Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-19T02:32:19.254827077Z","closed_at":"2026-01-18T15:43:51.462073945Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["phase-2","routing","safety"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-1rn","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-hfk","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:31Z","created_by":"import"}]}
@@ -260,7 +260,7 @@
 {"id":"fastapi_rust-oep","title":"Circular dependency detection","description":"Detect circular dependencies at startup:

DETECTION:
- Build dependency graph during route registration
- Detect cycles using DFS with visited set
- Report clear error: A -> B -> C -> A

ERROR MESSAGE:
'Circular dependency detected: DbPool -> UserService -> DbPool'

WHEN TO CHECK:
- During app.build() / app startup
- Fail fast before accepting requests

IMPLEMENTATION:
- Adjacency list for dependency graph
- Color-based DFS (white/gray/black)
- Report first cycle found

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- Circular deps detected at startup
- Clear error message with cycle path
- App fails to start with cycle
- No runtime penalty (startup only)

TEST REQUIREMENTS:
- Unit: Simple A -> B -> A cycle
- Unit: Long cycle A -> B -> C -> D -> A
- Unit: Diamond (no cycle) passes
- Unit: Self-dependency detected","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T15:12:00.010123292Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-21T09:04:17.537977543Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T09:04:17.537903253Z","close_reason":"Implementation complete: CircularDependencyError, ResolutionStack, ResolutionGuard all implemented. Added comprehensive tests: simple A->B->A cycle, long A->B->C->D->A cycle, self-dependency detection, diamond pattern (no false positive), error formatting, into_response. Library compiles; middleware test failures are pre-existing.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["di","phase-4","safety"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-oep","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-aha","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:33Z","created_by":"import"}]}

 {"id":"fastapi_rust-ox6","title":"Custom exception handlers registry","description":"Implement custom exception handler registration:

APP BUILDER API:
app.exception_handler(MyError, my_handler)
app.exception_handler(HttpError, custom_http_handler)

HANDLER SIGNATURE:
async fn handler(ctx: &RequestContext, err: MyError) -> Response

DEFAULT HANDLERS:
- HttpError -> JSON response with status/detail
- RequestValidationError -> 422 with error list
- CancelledError -> 499 Client Closed Request
- Panic (via catch_unwind) -> 500 Internal Server Error

HANDLER CHAIN:
1. Check for exact type match
2. Check for trait object match
3. Fall back to default handler

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- Custom handlers can be registered
- Type-safe handler registration
- Default handlers work out of box
- Handler can access RequestContext

TEST REQUIREMENTS:
- Unit: Handler registration
- Unit: Handler invocation
- Integration: Custom error type handling
- Integration: Override default handler","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T15:09:51.267639585Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-21T19:44:34.427649835Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T19:44:34.427602826Z","close_reason":"done","closed_by_session":"SilverHeron-exception-handlers","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["app","errors","phase-2"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-ox6","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-zom","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:33Z","created_by":"import"}]}
-{"id":"fastapi_rust-p6k","title":"Fault injection for resilience testing","description":"Inject faults to test error handling and resilience. Verify system behavior under failure conditions.

Implementation:
- Latency injection middleware
- Error injection (random failures)
- Connection drop simulation
- Timeout simulation
- Configurable fault rates

Fault Types:
- delay(ms): Add latency
- fail(rate): Random failures
- timeout: Simulate timeout
- disconnect: Drop connection
- corrupt: Corrupt response (testing)

Acceptance Criteria:
- Faults injectable via middleware
- Configurable fault rates
- Deterministic mode for tests
- No production impact (test-only)
- Clear fault logging

Tests:
- Delay injection adds latency
- Fail injection returns errors
- Timeout injection triggers timeout
- Faults only active when enabled","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T16:16:29.890567063Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-17T16:16:29.890567063Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["chaos","resilience","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-p6k","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-rhj","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:33Z","created_by":"import"}]}

 {"id":"fastapi_rust-plz","title":"Cookie setting in responses","description":"Implement Set-Cookie response functionality:

DIRECT RESPONSE:
let response = Response::ok()
    .set_cookie(Cookie::new('session', token))
    .set_cookie(Cookie::new('prefs', prefs).http_only(true));

VIA RESPONSE PARAMETER:
async fn login(res: Response) -> Json<Token> {
    res.set_cookie(Cookie::new('session', token));
    Json(token)
}

COOKIE BUILDER:
Cookie::new(name, value)
    .path('/')
    .domain('.example.com')
    .secure(true)
    .http_only(true)
    .same_site(SameSite::Strict)
    .max_age(Duration::hours(24))
    .expires(datetime)

DELETE COOKIE:
res.delete_cookie('session')
// Sets cookie with immediate expiry

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- Set-Cookie header generated correctly
- All cookie attributes supported
- Delete works (expires = past)
- Multiple cookies per response

TEST REQUIREMENTS:
- Unit: Cookie serialization
- Unit: Each attribute
- Unit: Delete cookie
- Integration: Browser cookie handling","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"","owner":"jeff141421@gmail.com","created_at":"2026-01-17T15:17:53.923648348Z","created_by":"Dicklesworthstone","updated_at":"2026-01-21T21:43:28.623076910Z","closed_at":"2026-01-21T21:43:28.622810508Z","close_reason":"Added set_cookie and delete_cookie methods to Response type. Both methods use the Cookie struct from extract module. Includes 5 tests covering: basic cookie setting, cookie with attributes, multiple cookies, delete via Max-Age=0, and combined set/delete.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["cookies","http","phase-2","response"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"fastapi_rust-plz","depends_on_id":"fastapi_rust-6jg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T00:10:33Z","created_by":"import"}]}
